Octopuses Mosquitoes Mars Weather Fiction Resumé About & Contact
Octopuses Mosquitoes Mars Weather Fiction Resumé About & Contact

Fiction

Exploring life on Earth and beyond

Inspired by the works of Arthur C. Clarke, Frank O'Hara, Mary Oliver, Kim Stanley Robinson, and Robin Wall Kimmerer.

The Autotrophs

"The Autotrophs" wonders what life on Earth might become on a Dyson Sphere given enough time.

A Brief History of Mars

"A Brief History of Mars" is a short story exploring the lives of two intrepid rovers on Mars.

Creative Computer

"Creative Computer" asks questions about human creativity in the face of generative artificial intelligence.

Solarium

"Solarium" is about life and revolution on an O'Neill cylinder space habitat at the Earth-Sun Lagrange 5 point. Art by Rick Guidice.

Starkite

"Starkite" is a short story about multigenerational projects, what is worth doing, and human exploration of the cosmos.

← Back to Data Visualization

Background

Resilience Continuum is a project by Claire Nyquist which explores science through data visualization. I'm excited about the combination of the apparently disparate fields of design and public health as they come together in data visualization.

Contact

For inquiries or collaboration opportunities:
